overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a grand gothic hall with a central marble statue, illuminated by warm candlelight. The camera maintains a static third-person perspective behind a robed character as other wizard-robed figures walk through the ornate interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic hall with central monument and candlelit ambiance

agents.ego_description: standing still in the grand hall, observing the surroundings and watching other robed figures pass through the space

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking from right to left across the foreground, passing close to the camera
small robed figure walking toward the central statue in the background

entered.detail: large white marble equestrian statue on a circular pedestal, the focal point of the hall
tall gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling on the left side
tall gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling on the right side
ornate stone staircase with balustrades leading to an upper level
ornate iron candelabra with multiple lit candles providing warm flickering illumination
intricate stone relief carvings covering the wall behind the central statue

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a grand gothic hall dominated by a central marble equestrian statue. The camera remains stationary behind a robed character who stands observing the space. Various NPCs in dark wizard robes walk through the hall in scattered directions, some passing close to the camera while others move in the background near the statue and grand staircase. Warm candlelight from ornate stands illuminates the marble floors and stone pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective within a grand gothic hall, capturing a moment of quiet observation amidst a flow of mysterious figures. It begins behind a stationary robed character who looks out over a vast space dominated by a central marble equestrian statue. As the camera holds its position, various NPCs in dark wizard robes drift through the hall in scattered directions, some gliding closely past the lens while others move toward the distant grand staircase. The scene is unified by the warm glow of candlelight from ornate stands, which casts flickering light across the polished marble floors and towering stone pillars.
